rule.description: Audit: $(audit.exe) created a file with filename $(audit.file.name) in the folder $(audit.directory.name).
Audit: $(audit.exe) created a file with a suspicious file extension: $(audit.file.name) in the folder $(audit.directory.name).
Audit: $(audit.exe) created a file with filename $(audit.file.name) but failed
Audit: $(audit.exe) created a file with suspicious file name: $(audit.file.name) in the folder $(audit.directory.name).
False positive. "malware-checker.py" is used by our red team for testing. This is just a temporary exception.
